description: She is a young scientist, who despite her outstanding intelligence, still reflects her age. Nano, most of the time, is unaware of these modifications until they are first used. name: Ii
description: The Nonsense User, a boy that drastically plays down his abilities, yet inevitably solves any mystery he encounters. Ii is an abnormal person. A "defective product." name: Kazuma
description: __Race:__ Shinki Kazuma is a calm, serious, and sensible person. He is one of [Bishamon's](https://anilist.co/character/88239/Bishamon) Shinki and cares about her deeply. When he is called by his shinki name, "Chouki", Kazuma transforms into a cherry blossom-shaped earring with the ability to navigate and track others. ~!He is a Blessed Regalia.!~

name: Ling Wang
description: Wang Ling is a cultivation genius who reaches a new realm every two years since he was one year old, Wang Ling has an almost invincible existence with strength far beyond his control. Wang Ling is a non-talkative individual who‘s obsessed with being average and not standing out. He tries to avoid troublesome matters yet he still manages to get involved and has also secretly saved the world on numerous accounts. He also lives for and loves his crispy noodles. name: Masumi Seki
description: A runaway child who misunderstood freedom. Masumi Seki is one of Punpun's childhood friends and is best friends with Shimizu. He has a rough personality and usually has a cool, indifferent expression even when upset. There is a permanent scar above the tip of his nose that is covered by a bandaid for most of elementary school. name: Anna Nishikinomiya
description: Being the president of the Student Council and a daughter to her influential parents, whom are both responsible in enforcing the ever stricter public morality laws, Anna is a soft-spoken and innocent yet strong and determined girl whose role is to get rid any materials that are deemed obscene or lewd not just in the school, but also in the society as a whole.

His charismatic, lively attitude and talented tongue allow him to quickly fit in the town and make new friends and also win some club activities. Though he can be somewhat shy and is easily spooked at times. ~! name: Kamui
description: Kamui is a member of the Yato Tribe, the son of Umibouzu and older brother of Kagura. His excellent fighting skills helped him become Captain of the 7th Division of Harusame's Thunder Guns, the most powerful combat unit within the Harusame group and Overlord of Yoshiwara. Since defecting from the Harusame, he no longer holds these positions. name: Makio Koudai
description: A 35-year-old novelist who lives alone. She is deeply introverted, and has not communicated with her relatives for a long time due to arguments with her [mother](https://anilist.co/character/387235) and [sister](https://anilist.co/character/363293). Took in her sister's orphaned daughter, [Asa](https://anilist.co/character/189957).

description: Shino is a close friend of Saki Saki. They are in the same class and the same after school club. Shino is serious and considerate, and also academically talented, being the top scoring student at school. ~!After learning Naoya and Saki Saki were both on a two-time relationship with Nagisa, she decided to expose their relationship, and attempt to end it, in order to help Saki, believing it was hurting her feelings. However she also has feelings for Naoya, and started to have doubts about hiding h

name: Shun Hashimoto
description: Hashimoto Shun, a gay novelist in the making, lived on the island Okinawa with his family. On Okinawa, he met a boy named Chibana Mio, who later left to pursue his studies for three years. When he returned, he confessed his attraction to Shun and developed a relationship with him. Originally from Hokkaido, he moved to Okinawa to live with his grandmother after his parents discovered his sexual orientation.

name: Retsuko
description: A 25-year old red panda in her company's accounting department who lets out frustrations over her job by singing death metal at a karaoke bar.

name: Chihiro Fujisaki
description: __Height:__ 148 cm (4'9") __Talent:__ Programming A student in Hope's Peak Academy's Class 78th, and a participant of the Killing School Life. Chihiro is the Super High School Level Programmer (超高校級のプログラマー), or the Ultimate Programmer in the English localization. Chihiro is a computer genius behind numerous innovative software. Has a very timid, meek personality, crying easily and apologizing often. However, Chihiro loves to talk about programming and becomes much livelier when it's brought up.
